| 2 | COMMENTS | CHAR | 65500 | Yes | - |  | "The goods and services purchased are for the use in production and therefore the VAT tax is posted to an input liability account to offset against an output liability account when the production goods and services are sold and tax charged. The tax is included in the vendor's cost/invoice.", "The goods and services purchased are for the use in production and therefore the VAT tax is posted to an input liability account to offset against an output liability account when the production goods and services are sold and tax charged.", "The goods and services purchased are for the use in production and therefore the VAT tax is posted to an input liability account to offset against an output liability account when the production goods and services are sold and tax charged. The vendor did not charge VAT tax, but it is due on the purchase of the goods and services and therefore needs to be calculated, accrued, and payable directly to the tax authorities when applicable.", "The goods and services purchased are for internal use and therefore the VAT tax is posted to an expense account." |

## Relationships (Application-Layer FKs)

**VAT_EXTRNL_CHECKS** -> USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**VAT_FINAL_REPRINTS** -> AR_TAX_TABLES (TAX_CODE->AUTH, TAX_CODE->ZONE); COUNTRY_CODES (CNTRY_CD -> CODE); TAX_GROUP_RATE (TAX_CODE -> GRP_CD)

**VAT_PROD_RETN_TYPE** -> USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**VAT_REPORT_DETAILS** -> COUNTRY_CODES (CNTRY_CD -> CODE); GL_MASTER (GL_ACCT -> GL_ACCOUNT); INVENTORY_MSTR (PART -> PART); LOCATION_ADDRESS (LOCN -> LOCN); ORDER_HEADER (SO -> ORDER_NO); ORDER_LINES (SO_LINE -> RECORD_NO); SHIPMENT_HEADER (SO_SEQ -> ORDER_SUFFIX)

**VAT_TAX_APPLIED** -> USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**VAT_TAX_AUX** -> USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**VAT_TAX_RULE** -> USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER); VAT_TAX_RULE_CMNTS (RULE_ID -> ID)

**VAT_TAX_RULE_CMNTS** -> VAT_TAX_RULE (ID -> RULE_ID)

**VAT_VEND_RETN_TYPE** -> USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**VAT_VEND_TAX** -> COUNTRY_CODES (VAT_CNTRY_CD -> CODE); TAX_GROUP_RATE (DFLT_TAX_GRP_CODE -> GRP_CD); USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER); VENDOR_NT (VENDOR_ID -> VENDOR); VENDOR_VAT_TYPES (VAT_RETN_VEND_TYPE -> VEND_TYPE)
